audience: an audience following "the world cup final"
insight: the audience is so used to seeing "your selfie" that they scroll past it, but "final night stands" is enough to make them stop for a second look
assetXElement: your selfie x final night stands

generationPrompts.image: Subject is your selfie, with visual details grafting in final night stands. Style: editorial photography, shallow depth of field, centered composition with negative space, natural light, 16:9
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three-shot script: shot 1 establishes your selfie in its everyday context; shot 2 introduces final night stands to create contrast; shot 3 lands the hook copy, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, built around "graft "the world cup final" onto "your selfie"", restrained tone, no exclamation marks
